modelFamily: Rule-based dimensional baseline with causal impulses
regimeGeometry: Reuse v1.4 archetypes, score power, confidence formula, confirmation threshold and divergence policy without modification.
labelUse: Labels are used only by the inner-validation evaluator after predictions are frozen; formulas are not fitted to outcomes.
outerOosPolicy: Forbidden for selection or parameter changes; optional diagnostic only after implementation and config hashes are frozen.
selectionPolicy: No impulse weight, archetype, threshold or confidence term may change after inner validation. Any change requires a new model id.
limitations: Uses monthly first differences and may miss shocks that reverse within a month.
Reuses the v1.4 regime geometry and therefore tests temporal feature adjustment, not a new taxonomy.
